<!-- Thanks for contributing to RHoiScribe. Keep the description short, but include enough context for reviewers to understand and test the change. -->

## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? Link an issue if this resolves one. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Knowledge update
- [ ] MCP prompt, resource, or tool
- [ ] Documentation or setup guide
- [ ] Build, packaging, or release
- [ ] Other

## Context for Reviewers

<!-- Include only what applies. -->

- Related issue:
- Affected prompt, resource, tool, or document:
- HOI4 version or source reference:
- Example input, output, or generated file:

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and did not include unrelated files.
- [ ] I updated user-facing documentation when behavior, setup, prompts, resources, tools, or output changed.
- [ ] I included source references or examples for HOI4 knowledge changes.
- [ ] I ran the standard checks, or explained skipped checks below: `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`, `cargo test`, `cargo build --release`.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private game files, or unrelated generated artifacts.

## Test Notes

<!-- Paste relevant command output, MCP client logs, screenshots, or generated-output previews. -->
